name: Ab Rollout
instructions: Kneel with an ab wheel, roll forward keeping core tight, roll back to start.

name: Arnold Press
instructions: Seated with dumbbells at shoulder height and palms facing you, press overhead while rotating palms forward, lower in reverse.

name: Barbell Curl
instructions: Stand with a barbell at thigh-height, curl to shoulder level keeping elbows pinned, lower with control.

name: Barbell Row
instructions: Hinge at the hips, back flat, pull the bar to your lower ribs, squeeze the shoulder blades, lower slowly.

name: Battle Ropes
instructions: Hold one end of a thick rope in each hand, create waves with alternating or simultaneous arm movements for the planned duration.

name: Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench, grip the bar slightly wider than shoulder width, lower to chest, press up.

name: Bicycle Crunch
instructions: Lie on your back, hands behind head, alternate bringing opposite elbow to opposite knee.

name: Box Jump
instructions: Stand in front of a box, swing arms, jump onto the box landing softly, step down.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Rear foot on a bench, front foot planted, lower the back knee toward the floor, drive up through the front heel.

name: Burpee
instructions: From standing, drop to a plank, do a push-up, jump feet to hands, jump up with arms overhead.

name: Cable Crunch
instructions: Kneel facing a high pulley, rope behind your head, crunch down bringing elbows toward thighs.

name: Cable Curl
instructions: Stand at a low pulley, curl the bar or rope to shoulder height keeping elbows pinned to your sides, lower with control.

name: Cable Fly
instructions: Stand between two pulleys set high, arms wide, bring hands together in front of your chest in an arc.

name: Cable Kickback
instructions: Attach an ankle strap to a low cable, hinge slightly forward, kick the leg back until the hip extends fully, return with control.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand sideways to a low pulley, pull the cable handle out to shoulder height in an arc, lower slowly.

name: Cable Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Face away from a high pulley, hold a rope overhead with elbows bent, extend arms forward until straight, return by bending the elbows.

name: Cable Pull-Through
instructions: Face away from a low pulley holding a rope between your legs, hinge at the hips, then drive them forward to standing by squeezing the glutes.

name: Cable Pullover
instructions: Stand facing a high pulley with arms extended overhead, pull the bar in an arc down to your thighs, return with control.

name: Seated Cable Row
instructions: Seated at a row machine, pull the handle to your waist, squeeze the shoulder blades, return with control.

name: Cable Tricep Pushdown
instructions: Stand at a high pulley, elbows pinned to sides, push the bar straight down until arms lock out.

name: Cable Wood Chop
instructions: Set a pulley at head height, pull the handle diagonally across the body toward the opposite hip while rotating the torso, return with control.

name: Standing Calf Raise
instructions: Stand on a calf-raise platform, lower heels below the step, then press up onto the balls of your feet.

name: Chest Dip
instructions: On parallel bars, lean your torso slightly forward, lower until the chest stretches, press back up to lockout.

name: Chest-Supported Dumbbell Row
instructions: Lie face-down on an incline bench, row the dumbbells up to your sides squeezing the shoulder blades, lower with control.

name: Chin-Up
instructions: Hang from a bar with underhand grip, pull your chin over the bar, lower with control.

name: Clean and Press
instructions: Power clean the bar to the front-rack position at shoulder height, then press overhead until arms are fully locked, lower to shoulders then to the floor.

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
instructions: Grip the bar shoulder-width, lower to chest with elbows tucked close to your sides, press up driving through the triceps.

name: Concentration Curl
instructions: Seated, elbow braced on inner thigh, curl the dumbbell up to shoulder, lower slowly.

name: Crunch
instructions: Lie on your back, knees bent, curl the shoulders off the floor by contracting the abs, lower slowly.

name: Cycling
instructions: Ride a stationary or outdoor bike at steady or interval pace for the planned duration.

name: Dead Bug
instructions: Lie on your back, arms extended toward the ceiling, knees at 90 degrees, slowly lower one arm and the opposite leg toward the floor while pressing the lower back flat, return and alternate.

name: Dead Hang
instructions: Grip a pull-up bar with both hands, hang with arms fully extended and shoulders engaged, hold for the prescribed time.

name: Deadlift
instructions: Bar over mid-foot, hinge to grip, chest up, drive the floor away, stand tall, lower with control.

name: Decline Bench Press
instructions: Feet secured on a decline bench, grip bar slightly wider than shoulder-width, lower to lower chest, press back up.

name: Diamond Push-Up
instructions: Form a diamond shape with your hands under your chest, lower your body keeping elbows close to your sides, press back up.

name: Donkey Kick
instructions: On all fours, kick one leg back and up until the hip is fully extended, squeeze the glute at the top, return and repeat.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
instructions: Lie on a flat bench with dumbbells at chest height, press straight up until arms extend, lower with control.

name: Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Stand holding dumbbells at your sides, curl one or both up to shoulder height, lower slowly.

name: Dumbbell Fly
instructions: Lie on a flat bench, arms wide with a slight elbow bend, bring dumbbells together above chest in an arc.

name: Dumbbell Pullover
instructions: Lie across a bench holding a dumbbell with both hands above the chest, lower it behind your head in an arc, pull back over the chest.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Seated or standing, dumbbells at shoulder height, press overhead until arms lock, lower with control.

name: Elliptical
instructions: Stride on an elliptical machine maintaining upright posture at a steady cadence for the planned duration.

name: EZ-Bar Curl
instructions: Stand with an EZ-bar using the angled outer grip, curl to shoulder height keeping elbows pinned to sides, lower with control.

name: Face Pull
instructions: Rope at face height, pull toward your face while flaring elbows out, squeeze the rear delts.

name: Farmer Carry
instructions: Hold a heavy dumbbell in each hand, walk upright with braced core for the prescribed distance.

name: Front Raise
instructions: Stand with dumbbells at your thighs, raise both arms straight forward to shoulder height with a slight elbow bend, lower slowly.

name: Front Squat
instructions: Bar resting across the front of the shoulders with elbows high, squat until thighs are parallel to the floor, drive up through the heels.

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on your back, feet flat, drive hips up by squeezing the glutes, lower slowly.

name: Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold a kettlebell at chest height, squat deep keeping chest tall and elbows inside the knees, drive up through the heels.

name: Good Morning
instructions: Bar across upper back, push hips back while hinging forward until torso is near parallel to the floor, drive hips forward to stand.

name: Hack Squat
instructions: Position in a hack squat machine with feet shoulder-width on the platform, lower until thighs are parallel, press back to the start.

name: Hammer Curl
instructions: Stand with dumbbells, palms facing each other, curl to shoulder height keeping wrists neutral.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
instructions: Hang from a bar, raise straight legs to hip or chest height, lower with control.

name: Hip Thrust
instructions: Upper back on a bench, barbell across hips, drive hips up until fully extended, lower with control.

name: Hollow Hold
instructions: Lie on your back, press your lower back into the floor, lift your shoulders and legs a few inches off the ground, hold that position.

name: Hyperextension
instructions: Position in a hyperextension bench with hips at the pad edge, lower your torso toward the floor, raise back up to horizontal by contracting the lower back.

name: Incline Barbell Press
instructions: Bench set at 30 to 45 degrees, grip bar slightly wider than shoulder-width, lower to upper chest, press back up.

name: Incline Cable Fly
instructions: Set pulleys at the lowest position, lie on an incline bench between them, bring the handles together above the upper chest in an arc.

name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
instructions: Sit on an incline bench with arms hanging behind the hips, curl the dumbbells to shoulder height for a full stretch, lower fully.

name: Incline Dumbbell Press
instructions: Bench at 30 to 45 degrees, press dumbbells from shoulder level to lockout, lower to chest.

name: Inverted Row
instructions: Hang underneath a low bar with body held straight, pull chest up to the bar by rowing the elbows back, lower with control.

name: Jump Rope
instructions: Skip rope at a steady tempo with short ground contacts for the planned duration.

name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Hinge at the hips, swing the kettlebell between your knees, drive hips forward to float it to chest height.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Seated at a pulldown station, pull the bar to your upper chest, squeeze the lats, return slowly.

name: Lateral Raise
instructions: Stand with dumbbells at sides, raise arms out to shoulder height, slight bend in elbows, lower slowly.

name: Seated Leg Curl
instructions: Seated at a leg-curl machine, curl the pad toward the back of your thighs, return with control.

name: Leg Extension
instructions: Seated at a leg-extension machine, extend your legs until knees are straight, lower slowly.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Feet shoulder-width on the platform, lower until knees reach 90 degrees, press back without locking out.

name: Leg Press Calf Raise
instructions: On a leg press machine with only the balls of your feet on the lower edge of the platform, press up onto your toes, lower heels fully.

name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Step forward into a lunge until both knees are at 90 degrees, drive up and step through with the other leg.

name: Lying Leg Curl
instructions: Lie face-down on a leg-curl machine, curl the pad toward your glutes until fully contracted, lower with control.

name: Machine Chest Press
instructions: Seated at a chest press machine with handles at chest level, press forward until arms extend, return with control.

name: Machine Shoulder Press
instructions: Seated at a shoulder press machine, grip handles at shoulder height, press overhead until arms extend, lower with control.

name: Medicine Ball Slam
instructions: Hold a medicine ball overhead, brace your core, then explosively slam it to the floor, catch or pick it up and repeat.

name: Nordic Curl
instructions: Kneel with ankles secured under a fixed object, lower your torso toward the floor as slowly as possible using the hamstrings, use hands to catch at the bottom, pull yourself back up.

name: Overhead Press
instructions: Bar at the shoulders, brace core, press overhead until arms lock, lower to the shoulders.

name: Pec Deck
instructions: Seated at a pec deck machine, bring the padded arms together in front of your chest, squeeze, return with control.

name: Plank
instructions: Forearms on the floor, body in a straight line from head to heels, hold for time while bracing the core.

name: Power Clean
instructions: Bar on the floor, explosively pull it by driving through the legs and hips, shrug, then catch it in the front-rack position at shoulder height.

name: Preacher Curl
instructions: Rest upper arms on a preacher bench pad, curl an EZ-bar or dumbbell to shoulder height, lower fully to get a complete stretch.

name: Pull-Up
instructions: Hang from a bar with overhand grip, pull your chin over the bar, lower with control.

name: Push-Up
instructions: Hands shoulder-width, body in a straight line, lower chest to the floor, press back up.

name: Rear Delt Fly
instructions: Hinge at the hips with dumbbells hanging below you, raise arms out to the sides in an arc, squeeze the rear delts at the top, lower slowly.

name: Band Pull-Apart
instructions: Hold a band at shoulder height, pull ends apart until arms are wide, return with control.

name: Reverse Lunge
instructions: Stand with dumbbells at sides, step one foot back into a lunge lowering the back knee toward the floor, drive through the front heel to return.

name: Reverse Pec Deck
instructions: Face the pec deck machine with arms forward on the pads, push handles back and apart in an arc to squeeze the rear delts, return with control.

name: Reverse Wrist Curl
instructions: Forearm resting on a bench with palm facing down, extend the wrist by lifting the back of the hand up, lower slowly.

name: Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Bar in hands, hinge at the hips pushing them back, slide the bar down the thighs, return by driving hips forward.

name: Rowing Machine
instructions: Seated on a rower, drive through the legs, pull the handle to the sternum, return by extending arms then hinging.

name: Running
instructions: Run outdoors or on a treadmill at the planned pace for the prescribed duration or distance.

name: Russian Twist
instructions: Sit with torso leaning back slightly, feet lifted off the floor, rotate side to side touching hands to the floor on each side.

name: Seated Calf Raise
instructions: Seated at a calf raise machine with pads on your thighs, press up onto the balls of your feet, lower heels fully below the platform.

name: Seated Row (Machine)
instructions: Chest on the pad, pull handles to your ribs, squeeze the shoulder blades, return slowly.

name: Side Plank
instructions: Rest on one forearm and the side edge of one foot with body in a straight line, hold for time, repeat on the other side.

name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Row
instructions: Place one hand and knee on a bench for support, row the dumbbell up to your hip, squeeze the back, lower with control.

name: Single-Leg Calf Raise
instructions: Stand on one foot on the edge of a step, lower your heel below the step, press up to full extension, repeat on the other side.

name: Single-Leg Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on your back with one foot flat and the other leg extended, drive the planted heel into the floor raising your hips until fully extended.

name: Single-Leg Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Stand on one leg with a dumbbell in the opposite hand, hinge at the hip reaching the free leg back until torso is near parallel, return to standing.

name: Sit-Up
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent, sit all the way up to vertical, lower with control.

name: Skullcrusher
instructions: Lie on a bench with an EZ-bar above your chest, lower to the forehead by bending the elbows, press back up.

name: Back Squat
instructions: Bar across upper back, feet shoulder-width, descend until thighs are parallel, drive up through the heels.

name: Stair Climber
instructions: Step on a stair climber at a steady pace for the planned duration, maintaining upright posture and consistent step depth.

name: Step-Up
instructions: Hold dumbbells at your sides, step one foot onto a box or bench, drive up until fully standing on it, step down and alternate legs.

name: Stiff-Leg Deadlift
instructions: Stand with bar, keep legs nearly straight throughout, hinge at the hips lowering the bar toward mid-shin, drive hips forward to return.

name: Straight-Arm Pulldown
instructions: Stand at a high pulley with arms extended, pull the bar down in an arc to your thighs keeping arms straight, return slowly.

name: Sumo Deadlift
instructions: Wide stance with toes angled out, grip the bar inside your legs, drive through the floor pushing your knees out, stand tall.

name: T-Bar Row
instructions: Straddle a bar anchored at one end, hold the loaded end with a close grip, row it to your chest squeezing the shoulder blades, lower with control.

name: Thruster
instructions: Hold a barbell in the front-rack position, perform a front squat, then use the momentum from the drive to press the bar overhead in one fluid motion.

name: Tricep Dip
instructions: Hands on parallel bars or a bench, lower until elbows hit 90 degrees, press back up to lockout.

name: Overhead Tricep Extension
instructions: Hold a dumbbell overhead with both hands, lower behind your head by bending elbows, press back up.

name: Tricep Kickback
instructions: Hinge at the hips with upper arm parallel to the floor, extend the forearm back until the arm is straight, lower with control.

name: Turkish Get-Up
instructions: Lie with a kettlebell pressed overhead in one hand, follow the sequence of rolling, kneeling, and standing while keeping the bell locked overhead, reverse the movement to return.

name: Upright Row
instructions: Hold a bar at thigh level with a narrow grip, pull it straight up to chin height leading with the elbows, lower with control.

name: V-Up
instructions: Lie flat on your back, simultaneously raise your legs and torso to meet above your hips forming a V shape, lower with control.

name: Walking
instructions: Walk at a brisk pace outdoors or on a treadmill for the planned duration or distance.

name: Wrist Curl
instructions: Forearm on a bench, palm up, curl the dumbbell up with the wrist only, lower slowly.
